calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Against Jose Jesus Villanueva Canchola Aka Jose Canchola Villanueva Pursuant To Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment.
Off Calendar Mar-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CAPITAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S motion for entry of judgment is granted. No opposition filed. The supplemental declaration of Susan Green is sufficient to meet the court's concerns about the requested judgment being an unenforceable penalty. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGMENT SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Against Jose Jesus Villanueva Canchola Aka Jose Canchola Villanueva Pursuant To Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment.
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Continued To Mar-17-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. SUSAN H. GREEN, ESQ. of Ring & Green, Tel No. 310-226-2550 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff California Capital Insurance Company;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Argument presented by counsel. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and continues PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CAPITAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion for Entry of Judgment Against Jose Jesus Villanueva Canchola aka Jose Canchola Villanueva Pursuant to Stipulation for Entry of Judgment to March 17, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. Plaintiff to provide notice of new hearing date on parties. Plaintiff shall have until 3/8/16 to file a supplemental declaration. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
